# Big4India

> Big4India is a premium legal, tax and compliance platform for Indian businesses. We handle company incorporation, GST, income tax, MCA/ROC filings, registrations, payroll and CA-certified certificates end-to-end, at transparent fixed prices. All prices below are professional fees in INR and exclude GST and government fees.

## How to engage
- Checkout is high-touch: customers start any service via WhatsApp at +91 9426262938 or by submitting the on-site lead form (name, mobile, email, city).
- A dedicated CA/CS expert is assigned to each engagement.

## Services and pricing

### Business Incorporation
- Private Limited Company — ₹1990
- One Person Company — ₹1490
- Limited Liability Partnership (LLP) — ₹1490
- Partnership Firm — ₹1290
- Sole Proprietorship — ₹990

### Registration & Licenses
- Udyam (MSME) Registration — ₹990
- Startup India (DPIIT) — ₹2490
- FSSAI Registration & License — ₹990
- FSSAI Renewal — ₹990
- ICEGATE Registration — ₹1490
- Import Export Code (IEC) — ₹1490
- PF Registration — ₹990
- ESIC Registration — ₹990
- Professional Tax Registration — ₹1490
- RERA Registration — ₹44990
- 12A Registration — ₹6990
- 80G Registration — ₹6990
- 12A & 80G Registration — ₹12990
- Digital Signature Certificate (DSC) — ₹1990

### Goods & Services Tax (GST)
- GST Registration — ₹1990
- GST Registration for Foreigners — ₹4990
- GST Amendment — ₹990
- GST Annual Return (GSTR-9) — ₹2990
- GST LUT Form — ₹1490
- GST Notice — ₹1990
- GST Return Filing — ₹1490
- GST Revocation — ₹2990
- GSTR-10 (Final Return) — ₹2990
- GST e-Way Bill — ₹490
